Complex EVAR Registry
SVS 2020 · ESVS 2024 · ESVS 2026 · VASCUNET
No setup needed
One-time setup to connect Google Sheets (~5 min)
1
Create a Google Sheet
Go to sheets.google.com → New spreadsheet → name it "EVAR Registry"
2
Open Apps Script
In the sheet: Extensions → Apps Script. Delete existing code. Paste all of Code_gs.js. Save.
3
Deploy as Web App
Deploy → New deployment → ⚙ gear → Web app → Execute as: Me → Who has access: Anyone → Deploy → Authorise
4
Paste the Web App URL below
The URL looks like: https://script.google.com/macros/s/.../exec
Your Web App URL

Export & Data Access
Loading...
⇓ Patients CSV
Demographics, anatomy, procedure and outcomes. One row per patient.
⇓ Follow-Up CSV
Surveillance visits linked by Case ID. ESVS 2024 protocol.
⇓ Full JSON Backup
Complete registry with nested follow-ups. Use to restore or transfer.
⇑ Import JSON
Restore from a previous backup. Replaces all current data.
Guideline compliance: SVS 2020 (Oderich et al., JVS 2020;73:4S-35S) · ESVS 2024 CPG AAA (EJVES 2024;67:192-331) · ESVS 2026 CPG DTA/TAAA · VASCUNET Core Dataset 2024.
